opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My whole head is burning and leaking yellow fluid. I put this new hair growth serum on a few hours ago and now I'm in absolute agony.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on within an hour of putting the stuff on and it's getting worse — the burning is unbearable and my scalp is weeping.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour after I rubbed a new hair-growth solution into my scalp, roughly four hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours and getting worse, not better
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning and stinging over the top and front of my scalp, and the skin is weeping a clear-to-yellowish fluid with tiny blisters
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: absolute agony — I've been pacing and holding an ice pack on my head
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the top and front of my scalp, exactly where I put the solution
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, slowly getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: an ice pack takes the edge off for a minute
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even light touch or anything warm makes the burning worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no swelling of my lips or throat, no trouble breathing, no fever that I know of
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — I've never reacted to anything on my scalp
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't concentrate on anything, the pain is all I can think about

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: gradual thinning of my hair on top and receding at the temples over about five years

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a hair-growth solution I bought online, which I applied today for the first time

family_history_as_reported.narrative: my father and older brother also went bald early

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; bought an unlabelled hair-growth product online from overseas to treat his thinning hair and used it for the first time today

objective_data_offered.value: bright red, sharply outlined redness across the top and front of my scalp exactly where I put the solution; the skin looks puffy and there are tiny blisters with clear-to-yellowish fluid weeping out
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by the patient over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: pacing, holding an ice pack to my head, clearly in a lot of pain
an unlabelled glass dropper bottle I ordered from overseas online, with no ingredient list on it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: unregulated product with unknown ingredients and concentration
